recommendations.title: Tetsuo II: Body Hammer
recommendations.overview: A Japanese salaryman finds his body transforming into a weapon through sheer rage after his son is kidnapped by a gang of violent thugs.

recommendations.title: A Snake of June
recommendations.overview: Rinko, a woman in a sexless marriage, is blackmailed by a stalker with intimate photos, forcing her into a series of erotic acts that disrupt her mundane life.

recommendations.title: Bullet Ballet
recommendations.overview: After his girlfriend commits suicide, a man becomes embroiled in gang warfare attempting to obtain a gun in hopes to kill himself.

recommendations.title: Tetsuo: The Iron Man

recommendations.title: Kotoko

recommendations.title: Shin Kamen Rider
recommendations.overview: A man forced to bear power and stripped of humanity. A woman skeptical of happiness. Takeshi Hongo, an Augmentation made by SHOCKER, and Ruriko Midorikawa, a rebel of the organization, escape while fighting off assassins. What’s justice? What’s evil?

recommendations.title: After.Life
recommendations.overview: Following a terrible car crash, a woman awakes to find an enigmatic mortician preparing her for burial.
